page_content:
# Dr. Esmailie  
I had Dr. Esmailie for two classes. Biomedical Modeling, and Cardiovascular flows. I also had her for my senior design project and the project we did for her was as follows:
Novel Aortic Valve Model (Senior Design) Aug 2023 -- May 2024
* Led a 5-person team to design a low-cost replacement, reducing unit cost from \$10,000 to \$500.
* Validated performance via hemodynamic simulations and material stress testing against ISO standards.
* Presented technical presentation to an audience of 150+ academic and industry members.
She also said these things about me:  
However I also asked her to submit a lot of letter recommendations individually for each portal, which I am sure was very annoying especially given that she submitted some for both graduate school and medical school.
